channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Anyone need a new sofa., 15th April
item.description:
New set up of a living room. Sofa leftover.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43;45;47;49;51;53;55;57;59, St Peters Close, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 15th April
item.description:
Cw Faded giveway sign Needs replacing 600x600mm Give and take (Damaged Traffic Sign)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 15th April
item.description:
Cw kerbing X2 stones need resetting Corner of x1 needs filling Stats required Give and take (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 15th April
item.description:
X2 potholes
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 15th April
item.description:
Fw abrupt level Patch bleeding out Stats required 3000x605mm Fw closure (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th April
item.description:
15DB 28day with road closure CW pothole 1600x700x65mm perm repair (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 15th April
item.description:
Fw abrupt level 2000x907mm Patch needed Fw closure in place (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 15th April
item.description:
